_meta.notes: Woodcutting trainer. Found in drowned-orchard. The Axe Named Thane is, in fact, an axe — it speaks. The villagers stopped questioning it years ago.

tagline: a long-handled woodcutter's axe, leaned against a stump. when you approach, it speaks.

behavior.default: rests blade-down, talking quietly to the stump
behavior.ifAttacked: calls for the woodcutters; they always come
narrativeHooks: Thane was a person once. Thane is now an axe. Thane prefers it this way.
When Thane teaches, the lesson goes through your hands without your hands asking.

teachingLines: Read the grain. Cut where it tells you to.
If the wood doesn't give, you're cutting wrong.
